notes: AGENT-INTEGRATION0A defines the 88CN review queue import contract for worker artifacts with result AGENT_INTEGRATION0A_REVIEW_QUEUE_IMPORT_CONTRACT_READY. It adds docs, schemas, synthetic fixtures, and a local validator only. It does not import data, publish data, start runtime, run crawler, use Redis/queue runtime, write Supabase/staging/production DB, mutate published_projection, mutate sitemap/frontend, deploy, SSH, touch cloud resources, mutate 88cn-index-data, or mutate 88cn-scout-worker.
